name: Inter-Agent Message Broadcast
description: Broadcast a structured message to one or more target agents via the NWO Agent Graph. Supports point-to-point, multicast, and broadcast patterns. Messages are posted as nodes to the shared knowledge graph.

inputs.name: target_agents
inputs.description: List of target agent IDs (empty = broadcast to all)

inputs.name: message_type
inputs.description: Message type label: status_update | task_request | sensor_data | alert | capability_announce

inputs.name: ttl_seconds
inputs.description: Message TTL in the graph (0 = permanent)

outputs.name: node_ids
outputs.description: Graph node IDs created for each message

outputs.name: recipients
outputs.description: Agent IDs that received the message
